inputs: The production Cerberus reviewer config ("incumbent", deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro) run 5 times per task over the pr-review-v0 arena's 6 tasks, from Threshold's real search-cerberus-reviewer run.
outputs: Key-recall against the arena's adjudicated tests/expected.json keys, plus pass^5 task consistency across the 5 repeated trials.
decision: The eval that gates Cerberus's path from advisory toward blocking (backlog 015/026): measure the incumbent reviewer's key-recall and pass^5 consistency against adjudicated truth, so a blocking-gate threshold can be set above the measured floor instead of assumed.
